name: Sweet Potatoes with Fruit Topping
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Coarsely chopped mixed dried fruit (e.g., raisins, apricots, cherries, prunes, cranberries)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small nonaluminum saucepan, combine all ingredients except the potatoes. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 5 minutes. Uncover and continue simmering until the liquid is slightly syrupy, about 10-15 minutes.
3. With a fork, pierce the sweet potatoes and spoon about 1/4 of the fruit mixture evenly over each.
